debug_info.goal:
case refine_3
G : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Group G
K : ℝ
inst✝ : DecidableEq G
A : Finset G
hA₀ : A.Nonempty
hA : ↑(A ^ 2).card ≤ K * ↑A.card
hK : 1 ≤ K
S : Finset G := {g ∈ A⁻¹ * A | ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(MulOpposite.op g • A ∩ A).card}
hS₁ : 1 ∈ S
hS₀ : S.Nonempty
hSA : S ⊆ A⁻¹ * A
hSsymm : S⁻¹ = S
hScard : ↑S.card ≤ K ^ 2 * ↑A.card
F : Finset G
hFA : F ⊆ A
hFcard : ↑F.card ≤ 2 * K
hASF : A ⊆ S * F
⊢ ∃ a ∈ A, ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2).card

failed_attempts:
rcases hA₀ with ⟨a, haA⟩
    refine ⟨a, haA, ?_⟩
    simpa [S] using (by
      have : a ∈ S := by
        simp [S, haA]
      exact (Finset.mem_filter.mp this).2)

obtain ⟨a, haA, ha⟩ := hA₀
    refine ⟨a, haA, ?_⟩
    simpa [S, Set.smul_set_def, Set.image_image, Set.image_id', Set.preimage_image_eq_iff] using ha

rcases hA₀ with ⟨a, haA⟩
    refine ⟨a, haA, ?_⟩
    simpa [S, haA] using (by
      have : a ∈ A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2 := by
        simp [haA, hS₁]
      exact le_trans (by rfl) (le_of_lt (by
        have : (0 : ℝ) < (↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2).card) + 1 := by positivity
        linarith)))

rcases hA₀ with ⟨a, haA⟩
    refine ⟨a, haA, ?_⟩
    simpa [S] using (by
      have : a ∈ (A : Set G) := by simpa using haA
      exact (by
        have : (MulOpposite.op a)⁻¹ • (a : G) ∈ S := by
          simpa [S, haA] using hS₁
        simpa [mul_smul] ))

nlinarith [hFcard, this]
          nlinarith [this, hpos]
        nlinarith [hle, hcard]
      exact this

have hA' : ∃ a ∈ A, a ∈ S * F := by
      rcases hA₀ with ⟨a, haA⟩
      refine ⟨a, haA, ?_⟩
      exact hASF haA
    rcases hA' with ⟨a, haA, haSF⟩
    rcases mem_mul.mp haSF with ⟨s, hsS, f, hfF, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨a, haA, ?_⟩
    have hs : (MulOpposite.op (s * f) • S ^ 2) = (MulOpposite.op f • (MulOpposite.op s • S ^ 2)) := by
      ext x; simp [mul_smul]
    have hsubset :
        (A ∩ MulOpposite.op (s * f) • S ^ 2) ⊆ (A ∩ MulOpposite.op f • A) := by
      intro x hx
      rcases mem_inter.mp hx with ⟨hxA, hx⟩
      refine mem_inter.mpr ⟨hxA, ?_⟩
      have : x ∈ MulOpposite.op (s * f) • ((A⁻¹ * A) ^ 2) := by
        have : x ∈ MulOpposite.op (s * f) • (S ^ 2 : Set G) := by
          simpa [Set.smul_set_like, Finset.coe_pow] using hx
        exact Set.smul_mono (by
          have : (S ^ 2 : Set G) ⊆ ((A⁻¹ * A) ^ 2 : Set G) := by
            simpa [Finset.coe_pow] using (by gcongr : (S ^ 2 : Finset G) ⊆ (A⁻¹ * A) ^ 2)
          exact this) this
      have hx' : x ∈ MulOpposite.op f • A := by
        rcases this with ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩
        have hyA : y ∈ (A⁻¹ * A : Set G) ^ 2 := hy
        have : (MulOpposite.op (s * f) • ((A⁻¹ * A) ^ 2 : Set G)) ⊆ (MulOpposite.op f • A) := by
          intro z hz
          rcases hz with ⟨w, hw, rfl⟩
          rcases Set.mem_pow_two.mp hw with ⟨u, hu, v, hv, rfl⟩
          rcases Set.mem_mul.mp hu with ⟨a1, ha1, a2, ha2, rfl⟩
          rcases Set.mem_mul.mp hv with ⟨a3, ha3, a4, ha4, rfl⟩
          refine ⟨a3⁻¹ * a4 * (a1⁻¹ * a2), ?_, by simp [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]⟩
          have ha4A : a4 ∈ (A : Set G) := ha4
          exact ha4A
        exact this ⟨y, hyA, rfl⟩
      exact hx'
    have hcard :
        (↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op (s * f) • S ^ 2).card : ℝ) ≤
          ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op f • A).card := by
      exact_mod_cast card_le_card hsubset
    have hfA : f ∈ A := hFA hfF
    have hfmem : f⁻¹ ∈ A⁻¹ := by simpa using mem_inv.mpr hfA
    have hrewrite :
        (A ∩ MulOpposite.op f • A) = (MulOpposite.op f⁻¹ • A ∩ A) := by
      ext x; simp [SetLike.ext', mul_smul]
    have hS_def : ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(MulOpposite.op f⁻¹ • A ∩ A).card := by
      have : f⁻¹ ∈ S := by
        have : f⁻¹ ∈ A⁻¹ * A := by
          refine mem_mul.mpr ⟨f⁻¹, ?_, 1, ?_, by simp⟩
          · simpa using hfmem
          · simpa [hA₀.ne_empty] using (show (1:G) ∈ A from by
              rcases hA₀ with ⟨a0, ha0⟩
              simpa using ha0)
        have : f⁻¹ ∈ {g ∈ A⁻¹ * A | ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(MulOpposite.op g • A ∩ A).card} := by
          simp [S, this]
        simpa [S] using this
      simpa [S] using (by
        have := (by
          have : f⁻¹ ∈ S := this
          simpa [S] using (show ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(MulOpposite.op (f⁻¹) • A ∩ A).card from (by
            simpa [S] using (by
              have := (mem_filter.mp this).2
              exact this)))
        exact this)
    have hfinal :
        (↑A.card / (2 * K) : ℝ) ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op (s * f) • S ^ 2).card := by
      have : (↑A.card / (2 * K) : ℝ) ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op f • A).card := by
        simpa [hrewrite] using hS_def
      exact le_trans this (by
        have := hcard
        exact this)
    simpa [Finset.smul_def] using hfinal

rcases hA₀ with ⟨a, haA⟩
    refine ⟨a, haA, ?_⟩
    have ha : a ∈ A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • (S ^ 2) := by
      refine ⟨haA, ?_⟩
      simpa using (show a ∈ MulOpposite.op a • (S ^ 2) from by
        simpa [smul_smul] using (Set.smul_mem_smul_set (MulOpposite.op a) ?_))
    ·
      have : (1 : G) ∈ (S ^ 2) := by
        simpa [pow_two] using mul_mem_mul (hS₁) (hS₁)
      simpa using this
    ·
      have hne : (A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • (S ^ 2)).Nonempty := ⟨a, ha⟩
      have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ #(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • (S ^ 2)) := by
        simpa [Finset.one_le_card] using hne
      have hpos : (0 : ℝ) < #A / (2 * K) := by positivity
      exact le_trans (le_of_lt hpos) (le_trans (by simpa using this) (le_rfl))

rcases hA₀ with ⟨a, haA⟩
    refine ⟨a, haA, ?_⟩
    have hsub : A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • (S ^ 2) ⊆ A := by
      intro x hx
      exact hx.1
    have hcard : ((A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • (S ^ 2)).card : ℝ) ≤ (A.card : ℝ) := by
      exact mod_cast card_le_card hsub
    have hpos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (A.card : ℝ) / (2 * K) := by positivity
    exact le_trans hpos hcard
